title: Kids Crayon Travel Journal Illustration

imagePrompts.prompt: Please create a vibrant, child-like crayon-style vertical (9:16) illustration titled “{City Name} Travel Journal.” The artwork should look as if it were drawn by a curious child using colorful crayons, featuring a soft, warm light-toned background, bright reds, blues, greens, and other cheerful colors. Draw a winding, zigzagging travel route with arrows and dotted lines connecting multiple recommended attractions, cute doodles, local landmarks, foods, playful handwritten notes, funny signboards, sticker-style short phrases, and childlike exclamations. Use a crayon children’s hand-drawn travel diary style, a bright warm colorful palette, cozy lively composition, cute handwritten text, and the feeling of a young child’s fun travel-journal entry. Input: Chicago 7-Day Trip, English
